sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15229" key="a(rmathgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁρμᾰτ-ηγός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄγω</etym>) <sense id="n15229.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">driving a chariot,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τροχοί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0655.tlg001.perseus-grc1:6:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Parth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.14</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
